name: io.github.CHANGCHINFU/mcp-gauge
description: Verifiable environmental, agriculture, power-grid, shipping & regulatory-filing signals for AI agents — pay-per-call in USDC on Base via x402 (no API key). Official sources + record_hash provenance.

environmentVariables.name: EVM_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: 0x Base-mainnet wallet key with a little USDC — required only for PAID tools (x402, gasless). Free tools work without it.
